query: SELECT id, planType, trialStartDate, trialDays, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, trialStartDate, NOW()) AS minutes_elapsed, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, trialStartDate, NOW()) / 60.0 AS hours_elapsed FROM establishments WHERE id = 30001;
